summary: Frontend UI testing for Admin Customer Service Management page (/management/customer-service). Verified all 11 features: page loads correctly, tabs are distinguishable with filled/outline styles, Dashboard shows KPI stats with gradient card backgrounds, Tickets tab shows ticket cards with gradient backgrounds and service-specific colored tags, Team tab shows members with gradient cards. Ticket detail modal opens correctly with proper styling. Rate limiting (429) caused some test interruptions but core functionality verified.
critical_code_review_comments: All UI improvements implemented correctly per requirements
Tabs use custom button-based design: inline-flex bg-[#082c59]/[0.06] container
Active tab styling: bg-[#082c59] text-white shadow-md
KPI stats cards use StatsCard component with bg-gradient-to-br and color gradients (blue, green, purple, amber, red)
Chart cards use bg-gradient-to-br from-[#082c59]/[0.03] to-slate-50/80
TicketCard uses bg-gradient-to-r from-[#082c59]/[0.03] via-slate-50/50 to-slate-100/40
TAG_COLORS object maps service types to Tailwind colors (booking=blue, technical=red, payment=emerald, hotels=rose, etc.)
TeamTab uses gradient backgrounds: bg-gradient-to-b from-[#082c59]/[0.03] to-slate-50/50
Ticket detail modal overlay: bg-[#082c59]/70 backdrop-blur-sm
Sub-tabs on Tickets have colored gradients: Open=blue, In Progress=purple, Closed=green
seed_data_creation: Used existing test tickets from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Customer Service Management page (/management/customer-service) UI improvements tested. All features working: custom button tabs with filled/outline styles, gradient backgrounds (#082c59/slate) on all cards/panels, service-specific colored tags (booking=blue, technical=red, payment=emerald, hotels=rose), Dashboard with KPI stats and charts, Tickets with sub-tabs (Open/In Progress/Closed), Team with member cards. Ticket detail modal works with proper gradient overlay.

page_loads_correctly.details: Customer Service Center page loads without errors at /management/customer-service

tabs_distinguishable.details: Dashboard/Tickets/Team tabs clearly distinguishable with filled (bg-[#082c59] text-white) vs outline styles

dashboard_kpi_stats.details: KPI stats displayed with gradient card backgrounds: Total Tickets (blue), Open (green), In Progress (purple), Unassigned (amber), Urgent (red), Resolved Today (green)

dashboard_charts.details: Tickets by Category (pie chart) and Tickets by Status (bar chart) displayed with gradient card backgrounds

tickets_tab_gradient.details: Ticket cards use bg-gradient-to-r from-[#082c59]/[0.03] via-slate-50/50 to-slate-100/40 (not plain white)

service_colored_tags.details: Tags have service-specific colors - booking=blue, technical=red, payment=emerald, hotels=rose, inquiry=cyan, etc.

sub_tabs_work.details: Open/In Progress/Closed sub-tabs work correctly with colored gradient styling when active

team_tab_gradient.details: Team member cards have gradient backgrounds, Add Team Member section has gradient border

ticket_detail_modal.details: Ticket detail modal opens correctly with gradient overlay (bg-[#082c59]/70 backdrop-blur-sm) and proper sidebar details

create_on_behalf_button.details: Create Ticket button visible with proper styling (bg-[#082c59] hover:bg-[#0a3a75])

search_and_filters.details: Search input and Filters button present on Tickets tab with proper functionality
